exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Bench Press
exercises.notes: Target 12 per set. Last time 12/12 @ 20 at RPE 8 (first set was a narrow-grip experiment at 15 — hit shoulders not pecs, drop that). Normal grip, lock a clean 3x12 @ 20 before adding.

exercises.name: Box Squat
exercises.notes: Up 2.5kg (50 -> 52.5). Did 3x10 @ 50 at RPE 7 — had room. Target 10 per set. Controlled depth, knee-safe, sit back onto the box.

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.notes: Target 12 per set. 3x12 @ 50 at RPE 9 last time. Hold at 50, bring RPE down to <=8 before adding. Squeeze, no torso swing.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Target 10 per set. 12/10/10 @ 10 at RPE 9 last time. Hold at 10 (per hand), clean 3x10 at lower RPE before adding. Knee-safe.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Up 2.5kg (40 -> 42.5). Did 3x12 @ 40 at RPE 6 — too easy. Target 12, full stretch at top.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: Target 10 per set (dropped from 12 — last time 12/12/12/9 @ 15 at RPE 10, missed the 4th). Hold at 15, hit a clean 4x10 before pushing reps back up. Neutral grip, no swing.
